notes: Shifted from Road B (unit mismatch) | HD canonical /p/ for 1/2" brass full-port ball valves is a 5-pack contractor bundle (e.g. Apollo/BrassCraft 5-pk, ~$40-$55). Per-unit estimator needs a per-each band. US 2024-26 single-unit retail: lead-free brass full-port 1/2" sweat or threaded valves run ~$8 (basic threaded, big-box) to ~$18 (premium SharkBite push-to-connect or Apollo lead-free w/ MIPxFIP). Source: HD 5-pack /p/ + supply-house single-unit listings (Ferguson, SupplyHouse).
